mapper.sql: a.id ,a.uuid ,a.plan_code ,a.plan_name ,a.plan_name_smt ,a.mno ,a.host ,GET_COMPANY_NM(a.host) hostNm ,a.plan_type ,a.sup_data_val ,a.sup_qos ,a.sup_call_val ,a.sup_sms_val ,a.normal_price ,a.sale_price ,a.after_price ,a.promotion_period ,a.promotion_period_val ,a.combination_enable ,a.benefit ,a.freebies ,a.link_url ,a.url_smt ,a.business_name ,a.etc ,a.sale_status ,a.disp_yn ,a.new_yn ,a.image_badge_special ,a.image_badge_it_comb ,a.image_badge_add_data ,a.image_badge_add_data_nm ,a.image_badge_simple_open ,a.supp_content ,a.no_supp_content ,a.event_banner_image_pc ,a.event_banner_image_mo ,a.event_banner_image_url ,a.event_banner_image_target ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,a.point_plan_yn ,a.m12_price ,a.m24_price ,IFNULL(a.sup_call_buga_val, '') as sup_call_buga_val ,(a.sup_qos / 1024) AS int_qos ,a.daily_data ,a.plan_name_smt_sub ,a.second_price ,(select max(logo_img) from tb_mbm_company_list where id = a.host) planLogoImg ,b.order_state ,b.open_comp_dttm
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_online_open b LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list a ON a.id = b.plan_id

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_online_open b LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list a ON a.id = b.plan_id
ORDER BY b.create_date DESC LIMIT 1
